arts.ttl: Man United 'make Antony transfer decision' as club 'following' £75m-rated star
arts.sum: Latest Manchester United transfer news and gossip includes an update on Antony and Castello Lukeba

arts.ttl: Yoro, Shaw, Mainoo - Manchester United injury news and return dates ahead of Fenerbahce clash
arts.sum: Man United will be hoping to build on Saturday's 2-1 win over Brentford when they face Jose Mourinho's Fenerbahce in the Europa League on Thursday evening.

arts.ttl: Thomas Frank makes surprise admission over Man Utd job
arts.sum: Thomas Frank has admitted that taking the Manchester United job will "probably not make his life better" amid recent links. Along with Frank, former England manager Gareth Southgate as well as the club's assistant coach Ruud van Nistelrooy have both also been linked with taking charge at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: How Jose Mourinho has done at Fenerbahce so far ahead of Man Utd reunion
arts.sum: Last season's second place Super Lig finish qualified Fenerbahce for the 2024/25 Champions League, entering the competition in the second qualifying round in late July. Even more agonisingly, Fenerbahce, whose 93 points from 1988/89 was the previous single season Super Lig record, put up the second higher tally of all time (99) and still finished second.

arts.ttl: Why Jose Mourinho has revelled so much in beating Manchester United over the last 20 years
arts.sum: Jose Mourinho has been upsetting Manchester United for over two decades since he first dumped them out of the Champions League with Porto in 2004

arts.ttl: Man United outcasts Sofyan Amrabat and Fred on wanting to 'kill' their old club in Europa League showdown, thriving under Jose Mourinho at Fenerbahce and how Erik ten Hag was overruled on keeping Amrabat
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE: Sofyan Amrabat walks into the interview room that overlooks the pitches at Fenerbahce's Can Bartu training complex and delivers the customary Islamic greeting.

arts.ttl: Man Utd news: Erik ten Hag sends message to Jose Mourinho as Glazer family's new venture emerges
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Erik ten Hag will lock horns with Jose Mourinho on Thursday night as the Red Devils go in search of their first win in Europe this term

arts.ttl: "Out of my hands" - Man United star provides fresh update on future at Old Trafford
arts.sum: Christian Eriksen has expressed uncertainty about his future at Manchester United, admitting that he will not have any say over his potential stay after this season.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag's Man Utd record compared to Jose Mourinho
arts.sum: In comparison, during 2022/23 and 2023/24, Ten Hag's Red Devils played and won six fewer matches, with a final win percentage of just 59.1%. The Portuguese's Red Devils scored 206 times across his first two campaigns - one fewer than Ten Hag's side in six more matches - but only conceded 86 times, leaving them with a goal difference of +120.

arts.ttl: Man City break Man Utd's 15-year-old Champions League record
arts.sum: But the heavy nature of City's demolition of Sparta was enough to lift Pep Guardiola's side into third place thanks to a superior goal difference than the six other teams who also have seven points. Manchester City ensured on Wednesday night that the top three in the Champions League standings all belong to the Premier League, putting five goals past Sparta Prague.
